ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date the order was stocked */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the territory where the order was placed */,
  "order_line_item" INTEGER /* Line item number within the order */,
  "order_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_territory_id FOREIGN KEY ("territory_id") REFERENCES territories ("territory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territories" (
  "territory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each territory */,
  "territory_name" TEXT /* Name of the territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the territory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was counted */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., salesperson, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the order */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order at the time of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
